title: Figma - Welcome to Figma
description: Clean, modern SaaS welcome email from Figma. Strong brand identity with purple gradients, clear onboarding steps, and bold typography. Sets the tone for product exploration.

subject_line: Let Cowork do something real for you
title: Anthropic - Cowork AI Summarization Launch
description: AI product launch email from Anthropic featuring clean minimal design, strong value proposition, and sophisticated brand identity. Great example of tech product announcement.

title: Gamma - Imagine Product Launch
description: Bold product launch announcement with strong visual hierarchy and compelling headline. Clean modern design that builds excitement for a new AI feature.

subject_line: Upgrade to the new iPad Air. Now supercharged by M4.
title: Apple - iPad Air M4 Launch
description: Classic Apple product launch email with stunning product photography, minimal copy, and premium feel. Masterclass in letting the product speak for itself.

title: Starbucks - Spring Menu Launch
description: Vibrant seasonal product launch with bold colors, playful photography, and strong brand identity. Pastel spring palette with eye-catching beverage imagery.

title: Ka'Chava - Coffee Flavor Launch
description: Featured on RGE homepage. Rich product photography with warm coffee tones, strong hero image, and clear CTA. Great example of DTC product launch.

subject_line: Meet the new Oura Ring 4 Charging Case
title: Oura - Ring 4 Charging Case Launch
description: Premium tech product launch with sleek product photography, dark theme, and sophisticated minimal layout. Strong brand consistency.

subject_line: Meet The 2026 Indian Motorcycle Racing Team
title: Indian Motorcycle - 2026 Racing Team Announcement
description: Bold brand storytelling with dramatic photography and strong visual identity. High-energy announcement that builds brand excitement through motorsport narrative.

title: MoMA - Museum Welcome Email
description: Elegant cultural institution welcome email with art-forward design, sophisticated typography, and strong brand voice. Unique non-commercial approach.

title: Patagonia - Winter Running Gear Newsletter
description: Featured newsletter with stunning outdoor photography, storytelling-driven layout, and strong environmental brand identity. Blends commerce with purpose.

subject_line: Draw the Line: the chart your audience completes
title: Flourish - Interactive Chart Feature
description: Creative data visualization product announcement with interactive concept, clean design, and engaging visual storytelling. Unique approach to feature launch.

title: Type.lol - Platform Relaunch
description: Typography-focused product relaunch with exceptional type design, playful brand personality, and creative layout. Design community appeal.

subject_line: Simplify Color Selection with The Benjamin Moore Favorites Palette
title: Benjamin Moore - Favorites Palette
description: Beautifully designed color palette showcase with rich visual design, strong color usage, and elegant layout. The product IS the design.

subject_line: Smiles, welcome to the Lyka Pack!
title: Lyka - Pet Food Welcome
description: Warm, personality-driven DTC welcome with adorable pet imagery, friendly copy, and strong community feel. Excellent onboarding for subscription service.

title: Jumeirah - Luxury Hotel Welcome
description: Premium luxury hospitality welcome with stunning destination photography, elegant typography, and aspirational brand positioning. Gold-standard luxury email.

title: Mackage - Luxury Fashion Welcome
description: High-fashion welcome email with editorial photography, bold typography, and luxury brand codes. Strong visual hierarchy and aspirational imagery.

title: Shutterstock - Creative Platform Welcome
description: Visual-first welcome email showcasing the platform's creative assets. Strong imagery, clear value props, and effective onboarding flow.

title: Filmsupply - Cinematic Welcome
description: Cinematic welcome email with film-quality visuals, dark sophisticated palette, and strong creative brand identity. Stands out for its visual storytelling.

subject_line: Get a birthday reward on us
title: Ray-Ban - Birthday Reward
description: Iconic brand personality in a birthday rewards email. Strong product photography, bold design language, and clear incentive. Loyalty-building excellence.

title: Star Wars Outlaws - Season Pass Promotion
description: Immersive gaming promotional email with cinematic imagery, franchise visual language, and compelling storytelling. Shows how entertainment brands drive engagement.

title: TurboTax - Refund Increase Prompt
description: Effective transactional/behavioral email that turns a mundane tax task into an exciting opportunity. Clear value proposition with urgency.

subject_line: Did you see something you liked?
title: Blueland - Cart Abandonment
description: Clean, eco-friendly cart abandonment with friendly tone, product imagery, and sustainability-focused brand voice. Non-pushy recovery approach.

subject_line: The Airlift 7/8 Decadent Bodysuit in your cart sold out
title: Alo Yoga - Cart Sold Out Urgency
description: Clever cart abandonment that uses scarcity (sold out notification) as a re-engagement hook. Premium lifestyle imagery with urgency-driven copy.

subject_line: Lucky Yogi! Get 40% off 2 Lyka orders
title: Lyka - Pet Food Cart Recovery with Discount
description: Personalized cart abandonment with pet name personalization, strong discount incentive, and warm brand personality. Effective for subscription DTC.

title: Allbirds - Casual Cart Recovery
description: Friendly, on-brand cart abandonment with casual copy, clean product display, and sustainability messaging. Personality-driven recovery.

subject_line: Smiles Davis has invited you to Customer.io
title: Customer.io - Team Invitation Onboarding
description: Clean SaaS team invitation email with personalization, clear CTA, and product-focused onboarding. Effective B2B invite pattern.

subject_line: Did you know you could do this with Typeform?
title: Typeform - Feature Discovery
description: Engaging onboarding email that drives feature adoption through curiosity-driven subject line and visual product demos. Great SaaS activation pattern.

subject_line: Busy schedule? Training on your time.
title: Coda - On-Demand Training Onboarding
description: Smart onboarding email that addresses time objection directly. Clean layout with clear training pathways and helpful tone.

title: Resy - Year in Review Recap
description: Personalized year-in-review email with data visualization, dining history, and engaging recap format. Spotify Wrapped style for dining.

title: Zillow - Real Estate Re-engagement
description: Clean real estate onboarding/re-engagement with property imagery, personalized recommendations, and clear value proposition.

subject_line: Earn $600 for every new Host you refer
title: Airbnb - Host Referral Program
description: Strong referral email with clear financial incentive, clean design, and simple CTA. Benchmark for referral program emails from a major platform.

title: Fellow - Referral Thank You
description: Gratitude-driven referral follow-up with warm brand voice, product imagery, and community feel. Excellent post-referral engagement.

subject_line: Strategic thinking takes the stage at Adobe Summit
title: Adobe - Summit Event Newsletter
description: Professional event newsletter with strong visual design, clear session highlights, and compelling event storytelling. Enterprise-grade design quality.

title: Perplexity - AI Collaboration Announcement
description: AI brand collaboration announcement with modern design, tech-forward aesthetics, and strong partnership storytelling.

title: Reforge - New Product Announcement
description: B2B product launch with strong brand identity, clear value proposition, and professional design. Great example of knowledge platform announcement.

title: Unsplash - Holiday Community Thank You
description: Warm community appreciation email with beautiful photography, heartfelt copy, and strong brand values. Shows how creative platforms build community through email.

title: Patagonia - Environmental Advocacy
description: Purpose-driven brand email with powerful environmental messaging, stunning landscape photography, and compelling call to action. Gold standard for mission-driven brands.

subject_line: Now serving: Affogato L'Orange Buffing Bar
title: Soft Services - New Product Drop
description: Playful DTC beauty product launch with food-inspired naming, rich color palette, and bold visual design. Strong brand personality shines through.

title: McDonald's - Shamrock Shake Season
description: Iconic seasonal product return with bold green branding, playful lowercase copy, and strong cultural moment marketing. Mass-market seasonal excellence.

title: Sweet Ramblings - Newsletter Welcome
description: Charming independent newsletter welcome with hand-crafted feel, warm personal tone, and creative layout. Great example of personality-driven indie email.

title: Headspace - Mindfulness Brand Email
description: Meditative, calming email design that embodies the brand's core value. Minimal layout, soft colors, and evocative copy. The email IS the brand experience.

title: Pepper - New Merch Drop
description: Fun DTC merchandise drop with bold product photography, energetic brand voice, and strong visual identity. Community-building through merch.

title: Beefree - Community Recap Newsletter
description: Community-focused newsletter recap from an email design tool. Meta example of an email company sending great emails. Clean layout with event summary.

subject_line: Browse templates to streamline your next project
title: Notion - Template Discovery Onboarding
description: Smart onboarding email that drives activation through template discovery. Clean, minimal design with clear pathways to value.
